course.title: Course
course.summary: An OOAPI 5.0 course, materialized from a scholiq Course by the OpenConnector ooapi-catalog Synchronization
course.description: A course represents an educational offering published by an institution via the Open Onderwijs API (OOAPI 5.0). Course objects are written by OpenConnector's ooapi-catalog Synchronization target, consuming scholiq's DataExchangeJob (target: ooapi-catalog); OpenCatalogi never calls scholiq directly to produce this object. Once materialized, the object is rendered as an OOAPI 5.0 course resource via the x-ooapi schema annotation.

catalog.description: The OpenCatalogi catalog this materialized course belongs to. Set by the OpenConnector ooapi-catalog Synchronization target when writing the object, so a single shared course/program/offering schema (design.md D6) can still be scoped per institution's catalog the way DCAT scopes publications via catalog.registers/catalog.schemas.
catalog.title: Catalog

level.description: The education level of the course (e.g. bachelor, master)
level.title: Level

rioOpleidingseenheidId.description: The RIO (Register Instellingen en Opleidingen) opleidingseenheid identifier, when the source institution has one. Omitted from the rendered OOAPI resource when empty (OOAPI-005) rather than emitted as null.
rioOpleidingseenheidId.title: RIO Opleidingseenheid ID

program.title: Program
program.summary: An OOAPI 5.0 program, materialized from a scholiq Programme by the OpenConnector ooapi-catalog Synchronization
program.description: A program represents an institution's study programme published via the Open Onderwijs API (OOAPI 5.0). Program objects are written by OpenConnector's ooapi-catalog Synchronization target, consuming scholiq's DataExchangeJob (target: ooapi-catalog); OpenCatalogi never calls scholiq directly to produce this object.

catalog.description: The OpenCatalogi catalog this materialized programme belongs to. Set by the OpenConnector ooapi-catalog Synchronization target when writing the object (see the `course` schema's `catalog` field for the scoping rationale).
catalog.title: Catalog

level.description: The education level of the programme (e.g. bachelor, master)
level.title: Level

courseIds.description: The courses that make up this programme
courseIds.title: Course IDs

rioOpleidingseenheidId.description: The RIO opleidingseenheid identifier, when the source institution has one. Omitted from the rendered OOAPI resource when empty (OOAPI-005) rather than emitted as null.
rioOpleidingseenheidId.title: RIO Opleidingseenheid ID

offering.title: Offering
offering.summary: An OOAPI 5.0 offering (a course/programme run), materialized from a scholiq Cohort by the OpenConnector ooapi-catalog Synchronization
offering.description: An offering represents a single run (cohort) of a course or programme, published via the Open Onderwijs API (OOAPI 5.0). Offering objects are written by OpenConnector's ooapi-catalog Synchronization target, consuming scholiq's DataExchangeJob (target: ooapi-catalog); OpenCatalogi never calls scholiq directly to produce this object. An offering always references its parent course (OOAPI-006).

catalog.description: The OpenCatalogi catalog this materialized offering belongs to. Set by the OpenConnector ooapi-catalog Synchronization target when writing the object (see the `course` schema's `catalog` field for the scoping rationale).
catalog.title: Catalog

courseId.description: Reference to the parent course this offering belongs to
courseId.title: Course ID

programmeId.description: Reference to the parent programme this offering belongs to, when applicable
programmeId.title: Programme ID

period.description: The academic period of this offering (e.g. semester 1)
period.title: Period

academicYear.description: The academic year of this offering (e.g. 2026-2027)
academicYear.title: Academic Year

teacherIds.description: Identifiers of the teachers assigned to this offering
teacherIds.title: Teacher IDs

learnerIds.description: Identifiers of the learners enrolled in this offering
learnerIds.title: Learner IDs

rioAangebodenOpleidingId.description: The RIO aangeboden opleiding identifier, when the source institution has one. Omitted from the rendered OOAPI resource when empty (OOAPI-005) rather than emitted as null.
rioAangebodenOpleidingId.title: RIO Aangeboden Opleiding ID
